summary: Draft, closed PR touching sysdolphin baselib JPEG/HSD files. The diff rewrote large parts of hsd_3B34.c and hsd_3B5C.c, added a HSDJpegWork struct and adjusted prototypes in hsd_3B34.h, split or moved JPEG lookup tables, and replaced many generated-looking raw-buffer/M2C_FIELD blocks with named fields, loops, and helper calls. The only loaded feedback is the decomp-dev bot report, which showed broken matches and many regressions, so no match or accepted-source lesson should be inferred.

key_files.role: Large rewrite of hsd_3B34 JPEG-related code/data: include changes, extern/type changes, table definitions, removal of large generated-looking code, and introduction of fn_803B376C plus rewritten function bodies.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3B34.c +520/-1660, 2 hunks
raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c top hunk adds hsd_3A94.h and __mem.h, removes placeholder.h/Gecko_setjmp.h/string.h, changes externs and table definitions
raw_diff: around line 310 replaces hsd_803B3408 body area with fn_803B376C and local floating-point transform variables

key_files.role: Header/prototype surface updated for JPEG work buffer and related hsd_3Bxx functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3B34.h +22/-9, 1 hunk

raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h adds HSDJpegWork with luma/cb/cr/tmp/pred fields and changes prototypes for hsd_803B3408, hsd_803B51C8, hsd_803B5C2C, hsd_803B5C4C, hsd_803B5D70, hsd_803B5EA0, fn_803B61B4, fn_803B6820, hsd_803B6BE4

key_files.role: JPEG decoder cleanup/rewrite: signature changes, IDCT helper rewrite, typed work-buffer accesses, looped quant-table and block processing, and marker scanning in hsd_803B6BE4.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3B5C.c +259/-542, 5 hunks
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c changes hsd_803B5C4C/hsd_803B5D70/hsd_803B5EA0 signatures
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c rewrites fn_803B61B4 from u8* generated temporaries to s32* data/p/i locals
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c rewrites hsd_803B6BE4 using HSDJpegWork, p/end marker scanning, for loops, and width/height locals

what_changed: Changed three files: hsd_3B34.c, hsd_3B34.h, and hsd_3B5C.c.
Added HSDJpegWork in hsd_3B34.h with padding plus luma, cb, cr, tmp, and pred fields.

Changed several function prototypes from s32/u32-heavy signatures to int/u8/s32* or void* forms, including hsd_803B3408, hsd_803B51C8, hsd_803B5C4C, hsd_803B5D70, hsd_803B5EA0, fn_803B61B4, fn_803B6820, and hsd_803B6BE4.
Moved/split JPEG-related data tables in hsd_3B34.c, including lbl_80430C40, lbl_80430C80, lbl_80431090, lbl_80431638, lbl_80431678, lbl_80431690, lbl_8043169C, and lbl_804316B4.
Replaced many raw offset/M2C_FIELD style accesses to hsd_804D2E70 with HSDJpegWork field accesses in hsd_803B6BE4.
Replaced generated-looking repeated quantization and block-processing code with loops over i, y, x, and block.
decomp-dev bot reported broken matches and regressions rather than a successful match.
smart_moves: Introduced a temporary internal struct for a known work buffer instead of continuing to express all accesses as raw offsets.
Kept unknown helper names in address-style form such as fn_803B376C, fn_803B61B4, and fn_803B6820 rather than inventing semantic global names.
Used local role names such as data, p, end, width, height, block, and dst in rewritten JPEG parsing/processing code.
Converted visibly repeated byte-table filling and block transforms into loops, making the source hypothesis easier to review even though this PR did not demonstrate a matching result.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed temporary structs can clarify large work-buffer code, but they need strict objdiff/checkdiff confirmation because field recovery can perturb many nearby functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h adds HSDJpegWork
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 replaces base/M2C_FIELD offsets with work->pred, work->luma, work->cb, work->cr, work->tmp
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports regressions in hsd_803B6BE4 and other hsd_3B34/hsd_3B5C items

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large data-table reshapes are high risk in matching PRs; table split/ownership/size changes can break .data even when code readability improves.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c changes lbl_80430C80 from a 0x410 static table into smaller tables including lbl_80430C80[0x40] and lbl_80431090[0x5A8]
text_corpus: bot reports main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34 .data broken from 100.00% to 52.77%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Natural loops are worth trying for repeated generated blocks, but a PR should not claim success unless the loop form preserves the target assembly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 replaces repeated quant-table loads with for (i = 0; i < 64; i++) loops
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 replaces repeated block decode/dequantize sections with y/x/block loops
text_corpus: bot report shows many regressions after these rewrites

decomp_lessons.lesson: Header prototype cleanup should be coupled to verified bodies; broad signature changes across related JPEG functions can create a large review and regression surface.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h prototype changes

text_corpus: bot report lists regressions across hsd_803B3CD8, hsd_803B51C8, hsd_803B46D4, hsd_803B4A2C, hsd_803B3408, hsd_803B6BE4, fn_803B376C, fn_803B61B4, fn_803B6820, hsd_803B5EA0, and hsd_803B4D64

naming_conventions.convention: Observed temporary struct name HSDJpegWork with JPEG-domain fields luma, cb, cr, tmp, and pred.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h HSDJpegWork typedef

naming_conventions.convention: Unknown or insufficiently understood helpers remained address-style, e.g. fn_803B376C, fn_803B61B4, fn_803B6820.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h helper prototypes
raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c adds fn_803B376C
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c changes fn_803B61B4

naming_conventions.convention: Rewritten locals use short role names for parser and image/block processing state: data, p, end, width, height, i, y, x, block, dst.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 local declarations

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace raw hsd_804D2E70 offset accesses with a typed work-buffer overlay.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.h HSDJpegWork
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 uses HSDJpegWork* work = (HSDJpegWork*) hsd_804D2E70
assembly_or_matching_tactics.outcome: Unproven/negative in this PR slice; bot reported regressions.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Convert repeated generated assignments into compact for loops for quantization-table population and dequantization.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 uses for (i = 0; i < 64; i++) loops
assembly_or_matching_tactics.outcome: Readable tactic, but not validated as matching by loaded evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scan JPEG markers with pointer bounds checks and longjmp error paths instead of generated goto ladders.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c hsd_803B6BE4 uses while loops for 0xFFDB, 0xFFC0, and 0xFFDA marker search and longjmp on bounds failure

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use floating-point transform helper rewrites with named intermediate variables for IDCT-like math.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c fn_803B376C locals s07/s16/s25/s34/t0/t1/t2/t3 and constants 0.707107, 0.92388, 0.382683
raw_diff: hsd_3B5C.c fn_803B61B4 locals a through t and constants 0.980785, 0.19509, 0.83147, 0.55557, 0.707107

review_feedback.feedback: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 67.18% with -32 bytes and matched data 39.32% with -1104 bytes.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]

review_feedback.feedback: Two broken matches were reported: hsd_3B34 .data from 100.00% to 52.77%, and hsd_803B5C2C from 100.00% to 0.00%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: broken matches table

review_feedback.feedback: Two unmatched-item improvements were reported in .sdata2 for hsd_3B5C and hsd_3B34, but eleven unmatched-item regressions were also reported across hsd_3B34 and hsd_3B5C functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: improvements and regressions tables

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the loaded slice.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: review_comments 0, reviews 0

accepted_candidate_records.title: Data-table reshapes can break matching even when code cleanup looks plausible
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2479, JPEG table definitions in hsd_3B34.c were moved/split and the bot reported hsd_3B34 .data dropping from 100.00% to 52.77%. Treat data ownership, table sizes, and section placement as first-class evidence before landing code-matching cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_3B34.c table reshaping
text_corpus: bot broken match for hsd_3B34 .data

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed work-buffer cleanup needs verifier evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2479 introduced HSDJpegWork to replace raw hsd_804D2E70 offsets, but the loaded bot report showed regressions. Use typed overlays as a recovery tactic, not an accepted match, until objdiff/checkdiff confirms the exact target assembly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSDJpegWork typedef and hsd_803B6BE4 work pointer
text_corpus: bot regression table

source_update_candidates.title: Record negative examples for temporary typed work-buffer overlays
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a note that temporary structs for raw work buffers should be treated like other matching tactics: useful for readability and field recovery, but not reviewable as a match without narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence, especially when they cross many functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSDJpegWork introduced
text_corpus: bot reports regressions after the rewrite
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR is a concrete negative example supporting existing standards; curator may decide whether to add it as an illustrative note.

source_update_candidates.title: hsd_3B34/hsd_3B5C contain JPEG decode tables and work-buffer routines
source_update_candidates.text: PR evidence suggests src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34.c, hsd_3B34.h, and hsd_3B5C.c are involved with JPEG-related tables, marker parsing, quantization tables, IDCT-like transforms, and an hsd_804D2E70 work buffer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSDJpegWork fields luma/cb/cr/tmp/pred
raw_diff: hsd_803B6BE4 marker parsing for 0xFFDB/0xFFC0/0xFFDA
raw_diff: JPEG table labels and quantization/dequantization loops
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-context candidate, but should be checked against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote HSDJpegWork as an accepted canonical struct from this PR alone; the bot report showed regressions.
Do not claim any functions matched; loaded evidence reports broken matches/regressions and contains no successful objdiff evidence.
Do not infer reviewer intent or human review outcome; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not treat table names, table sizes, or section ownership as accepted facts without checking current source/symbol metadata.
